englishDefinitions: A person who was part of the Beat Generation, a cultural movement in the 1950s–60s that rejected mainstream society and valued jazz, poetry, and a bohemian lifestyle.
A nonconformist who rejects conventional society.
persianTranslation: بیتنیک (عضو جنبش بیت در دهه ۵۰ و ۶۰)
examples: In the 1950s, beatniks gathered in coffee shops to read poetry and listen to jazz.
She dressed like a beatnik, wearing all black and carrying a beret.
The beatnik movement influenced later counterculture movements of the 1960s.
